<svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 10 10" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" {{ $attributes }}> <path d="M5.25 9L9.25 5L5.25 1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/> <path d="M0.75 9L4.75 5L0.75 1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/> </svg>
